texto: Not everyone is running the same race,sometimes you gotta chosesometimes you gotta loseNot everyone is running at the same pace,sometimes you gotta look backsometimes you gotta wait for them on the trackNot everyone is looking for the same place,sometimes you gotta run fastsometimes you just gotta walk pastIt's like the cars on the freeway,they follow the red green rulesbut they are always on the moveLife is this and much more!though you keep running till you reach the heavenly doorafter all, it is all about the journey and the destination you adore!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kruthika Swaminathan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Not everyone is running the same race,sometimes you gotta chosesometimes you gotta loseNot everyo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, life-quotes, gotta pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viagem e reflexao.

texto: It seems fine to revolt in front of all,but apologizing fro the same in a similar situation makes you feel smallIt is an irony! that's what I call..
explicacao: Citação de Kruthika Swaminathan sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It seems fine to revolt in front of all,but apologizing fro the same in a similar situation makes…” articula reflexao, thought-provoking, seems em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
